chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3529 of 2015 Mst. Rubina Anjum Versus Najmul Islam and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.2145/2024 (withdrawal). 2. For hearing of CMA No.15572/2015. 3. For hearing of CMA No.17794/2015. 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.01.2024 Mr. Rashid Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Altaf Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Mr. Rashid Hussain, Advocate claims to be associate of Mr. Iftikhar Javed Qazi, learned counsel for the petitioner, requests for withdrawal of this petition for which the instant application [CMA No.2145/2024] under Order-XXIII Rule-1 CPC supported by affidavit of the petitioner is also filed. The application is allowed and the petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with other pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
